calibration.note: LR classifiers can disagree with MC when features are OOD; inference uses winsorized scaled inputs, clipped base SG, and optional field-median shrink.
metrics_to_monitor: Spearman rank vs actual finish (event holdout)
Brier / log-loss on win & top20 (calibrated vs base rate)
ECE on LR win prob bins
Mean abs error on exp SG/R vs realized SG/R
